hero.tag: ICT Student — Jyväskylä University of Applied Sciences
hero.name: Niki Rusi
hero.description: Programmer. From reinforcement learning to software development.

paragraphs: I'm Niki Rusi, an ICT student at Jyväskylä University of Applied Sciences with a focus on programming.
I enjoy making small to medium sized projects for personal use to try to help with my workflow in either my hobbies or my daily life.
Currently looking for work or internship opportunities.

projects.title: Reinforcement Learning Snake
projects.description: Trained an AI agent to play Snake using a custom reward structure and policy network. Explored exploration-exploitation tradeoffs and temporal difference learning in a classic environment.

projects.title: Future Factory — Traffic Map
projects.description: Collaborated with a multidisciplinary team to enhance a real-time traffic visualisation tool for an industry client. Focused on frontend programming, data handling, and team communication.

projects.title: Godot Project — The German Aerospace Center
projects.description: Contributed to designing and making a serious research game in Godot for my Internship of 6 months.

projects.title: Android App — The German Aerospace Center
projects.description: Contributed to making an Android app that calculated with bluetooth signals if the user was at a bus stop or in the bus. The app was made for a research project of the German Aerospace Center.
